name: PB Dye Golf Club
about: The Club at P.B. Dye Golf Club is an 18-hole, par 72 championship course opened in 1999, situated on 250 acres of rolling hills and woodlands. It offers a secluded atmosphere with a welcoming environment, complemented by a restaurant and full bar. The venue features state-of-the-art golf simulator bays and hosts various events, including weddings, corporate meetings, and tournaments. Members receive benefits such as advanced tee time reservations and unlimited practice facility use. The club is located approximately 30 minutes from the Capital Beltway in Ijamsville, Maryland.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator bays for year-round practice
Comprehensive event hosting including weddings and corporate outings
Full-service restaurant and bar for dining and relaxation

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The club provides club fitting and repair services, but whether you need to bring your own clubs depends on your personal preference and the type of session you're booking.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a restaurant and full bar available on-site. There is no mention of a BYOB policy, so it's recommended to dine at the restaurant.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 holes on a simulator is not specified, but it typically varies depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The club offers junior programs, suggesting it accommodates youth golfers, but specific details about kid-friendly amenities or simulator access are not provided.
